jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates:
Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Breach Candy Hospital Asia Pacific Associates!
